win.help.play.title=HOW TO PLAY
win.help.play.info1=Stone bubble - Can be popped only with fireballs and bombs.
win.help.play.info2=Chains - Hit the chains twice with the right color to break & unlock them.
win.help.play.info3=Rock - Nothing can pop it. try to drop it.
win.help.play.info4=Shell - Remove the shell before popping the bubble or else it will spread.
win.help.play.info5=Spiderweb - Prevents a poping sequence when hit.
win.help.play.info6=Ice - Wont pop when hit, but the ice will spread over, try to drop it.
win.help.play.info7=Counter - Has a number on it. every shot lowers the number by 1 till it burns into a rock bubble.
win.help.play.info8=Spike bubble - Piece bubbles that are shot close to it.
win.help.play.info9=Dandelion - Keeps bubbles from falling, but bubbles can go right through them.
win.help.play.info10=Wall - Hit it enough and the bubble behind it will show itself.
win.help.play.info11=Seismic bubble - Pop any bubble next to it and it will explode the surrounding bubbles.
win.help.play.info12=Random mine - Pop any bubble next to it, this bubble will paint surrounding bubbles in a random color!
win.help.play.info13=Paint bomb - When hit, spreads the same color all over the place.
win.help.play.info14=Rocket bubble - Pop it to fill your ROCKET power-up meter!
win.help.play.info15=Laser - Dont be fooled by this innocent looking bubble! it will shooot down bubbles that will get too close!
win.help.play.info16=Wings - Drop it and it will fly away somewhere else. try to pop it instead.
win.help.play.info17=Tarantula - When hit, spreads spiderweb all over the place!
win.help.play.info18=Binary stone - After every shot you make, the binary stone will change its state.
win.help.play.info19=Disco bubble - Switches color each time you make a move.
